summary: Comprehensive testing of Excel generation from chat (excel-generate endpoint + in-chat auto-detection + frontend result block). All 10 backend tests passed. All frontend checks passed. Feature is fully functional end-to-end.

minor.issue: When Claude returns 529 Overloaded error, the main response starts with 'Error:' which causes the in-chat Excel detection block to be skipped (condition: not response_text.startswith('Error:')). This is intentional design but means Excel generation silently fails during API outages. Consider adding a separate error message specifically for Excel failure scenarios.

design_issues.screen: Chat page - Excel preview table in messages
issues: Console hydration warnings: '<span> cannot be child of <th>/<td>/<tr>/<tbody>' - these are from visual editor span wrappers (x-excluded=true) injected around dynamic table elements. Not a runtime bug but may cause React hydration warnings in console. Functionally everything works correctly. (Known issue from iteration_12)

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/chats/{chat_id}/excel-generate - success returns {message, file_id, rows, columns, preview_columns, preview}
Backend: POST /api/chats/{chat_id}/excel-generate - generated file downloadable via /api/excel/download/{file_id}
Backend: In-chat - 'переведи' keyword triggers excel_file_id and excel_preview in response
Backend: In-chat - non-Excel message ('привет') returns excel_file_id=null (no generation)
Backend: In-chat - 'скачать' keyword triggers Excel generation
Backend: In-chat - English 'excel' keyword triggers Excel generation
Frontend: Excel result block visible with data-testid='excel-result-block-{index}' for messages with excel_preview
Frontend: Green styling (border-green-500/30, bg-green-500/5) present on Excel result block
Frontend: 'Excel готов — 3 строк' header text shown correctly
Frontend: Download button (data-testid='excel-download-chat-{index}') present and clickable
Frontend: Download button triggers file download (result.xlsx)
Frontend: Preview table (data-testid='excel-preview-chat-{index}') shows correct columns from excel_preview.columns
Frontend: Preview table shows 3 data rows (Alice/30/Moscow, Bob/25/Paris, Charlie/35/London)
Frontend: 5 assistant messages correctly do NOT show Excel block (non-Excel messages)
Frontend: Translated columns correctly shown (Имя, Возраст, Город) after rename instruction
critical_code_review_comments: In messages.py, the Excel detection block condition `not response_text.startswith('Error:')` means Excel generation is skipped when Claude API fails. This is intentionally correct but results in silent failure - the user gets a raw error string like 'Error: Error code: 529...' instead of a meaningful user-facing error. Consider catching this case and returning a localized error message.

excel.py and the in-chat detection block in messages.py have duplicate Claude call code (~50 lines each). Consider extracting the Excel transformation logic into a shared service function to avoid DRY violation.

In the in-chat detection block (messages.py ~line 759), if `json.loads` raises JSONDecodeError, the exception is silently caught by the outer `except Exception as excel_err` - this is acceptable but the logger.error call at line 789 would help diagnose issues.

The download endpoint GET /api/excel/download/{file_id} deletes the file after serving (background task). This means the download button in chat history will fail (404) for files already downloaded. This is a known design trade-off - the UI should handle 404 gracefully (it shows a toast error which is correct), but a warning tooltip on the download button about single-use would improve UX.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: project ID 24db323f..., chat ID 84597c00..., test_source_id a1e65d63... (test.csv, 65 bytes, 3 rows). Source is in chat's activeSourceIds.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Excel generation from chat feature is FULLY WORKING. Backend: POST /api/chats/{id}/excel-generate (auth, validation, 404 for bad source, success with file_id + preview) all pass. In-chat auto-detection: Excel keywords (csv, excel, скачать, переведи, generate, etc.) trigger excel_file_id + excel_preview in message response; non-Excel messages return null. Frontend: data-testid='excel-result-block-{index}', 'excel-download-chat-{index}', 'excel-preview-chat-{index}' all working correctly. Download button successfully downloads result.xlsx. Claude API experienced transient 529 overloads during initial test run but recovered. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_excel_generate.py
rca_of_issue: Claude API overload (529) during testing: Transient external API issue. No code bug. The backend correctly propagates the 529 error as a 500 with message 'AI processing failed: Error code: 529...'. In-chat detection correctly skips Excel generation when main Claude call fails (response_text.startswith('Error:')). Tests passed after waiting ~60 seconds.
